channel.title: Compliance Automation on DevOpStars | DevOps Consulting Delaware | US Engineering Teams
channel.description: Recent content in Compliance Automation on DevOpStars | DevOps Consulting Delaware | US Engineering Teams

item.title: FedRAMP DevOps: How SaaS Companies Should Approach Federal Authorization
item.description: FedRAMP authorization unlocks the $100B+ US federal technology market but most SaaS companies underestimate what it requires. Here’s the practical DevOps guide to getting authorized.

item.title: SOC 2 Automation for US Startups: Getting to Type II Without a Full-Time Compliance Team
item.description: Traditional SOC 2 costs $100k-$200k and 12-18 months. US startups with DevOps pipelines and a GRC platform can achieve it for $25k-$50k in 4-6 months. Here’s exactly how.
